name_en: , [Extended Shoulder Strap] 🥰 New GG brand series continues the design philosophy that items should not only be popular for a season, but remain timeless as time passes. The classic interlaced letter element derived from the initials of Guccio Gucci continues to inject brand identity charm into new designs. This Ophidia small bag features the historic GG Supreme canvas material, with double G accessories. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, brown leather trim, double G, adjustable top handle, top zip closure. Model: 735145. Dimensions: 21*19*5cm. Color: Brown/pvc. Italian creation
